/usr/bin/cc -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/gbemu.dir/main.c.o -o gbemu  /opt/homebrew/opt/sdl2/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/sdl2_ttf/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib ../lib/libemu.a /opt/homebrew/opt/sdl2/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/sdl2_ttf/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib
